name: ai-image
description: Unified AI image generation — 13 backends (volcengine/ark, qwen/dashscope, gemini, openai, minimax, stability, bfl, ideogram, zhipu, siliconflow, fal, replicate, openrouter) + shared YAML registry + /ai-image-config for unified key mgmt. Dependency of ppt-master, solution-master, tender-workflow.
